responsibilities: Implement new features and bug fixes in the ASP.NET Core web application
Write and maintain SQL Server stored procedures and LINQ queries
Write unit tests using xUnit and Moq
Participate in code review and daily standups
Work with QA team to verify bug fixes

mustHaveSkills.name: C#
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Proficiency in C# and .NET (5 / 6 / 7 or above)

mustHaveSkills.name: SQL Server
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Basic understanding of SQL Server and relational database design

educationRequirements: Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent
workAuthorizationSignals: Must be Australian citizen or permanent resident – no visa sponsorship
summary: Entry-level .NET role at a healthcare software company in Brisbane. Good for a CS graduate wanting exposure to regulated industry software. Onsite role; Australian work rights required.
